title: Loot
effect: Some wraiths carry valuable items and equipment. GM Intrusion: The attacked character must also succeed on a Might defense, or they take an additional 3 points of ambient damage and contract radiation sickness.
details: Some wraiths carry valuable items and equipment.
GM Intrusion: The attacked character must also succeed on a Might defense, or they take an additional 3 points of ambient damage and contract radiation sickness.
